title: ProjectParticipants
description: Layer 2 — who actually is on a concrete project (projects/<slug>/users.json). Never repeats master data: each entry references a person in the shared registry (people-registry.schema.json) via 'ref' and adds the project-specific role. 'title' and 'override' let a project locally override master fields without editing layer 1.

project.description: Project slug, identical to the containing folder name.

comment.description: Free-form explanation of the file's purpose and the ref rules (each entry references a person in the shared registry and adds a project role).

participants.description: People who are on this project, each with a project role.

ref.description: Reference to a person 'id' in the shared people-registry (projects/users.json).

projectRole.description: Role ON THIS project — may differ from the company 'title'.

title.description: Override/supplement of the company position, for this project only.

override.description: Overrides of individual master fields for this project only (e.g. a different contact).
